class.name: ASBridge
class.brief_description: Integration bridge between Ability System and LimboAI.
class.description: The [ASBridge] provides seamless integration between Ability System (AS) and LimboAI Behavior Trees / Hierarchical State Machines. It auto-detects LimboAI at runtime and registers custom BT tasks and LimboStates that interact with [ASComponent]. This bridge is optional - if LimboAI is not present, the bridge initializes but remains inactive without errors.

method.name: get_singleton
method.description: Returns the global ASBridge singleton instance.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes the bridge, detecting LimboAI and registering all bridge tasks. Called automatically during module initialization. Safe to call multiple times (idempotent).

method.name: is_limboai_available
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if LimboAI is available in the current engine instance (either as module or GDExtension).

method.name: is_limboai_detected
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if LimboAI was detected and bridge tasks were successfully registered.

method.name: shutdown
method.description: Shuts down the bridge and unregisters tasks. Called during module termination.
